oshi/src/main/java/com/example/CPUInfo.j.general_idea: Replaced naive single-call CPU load retrieval with a robust two-snapshot approach to accurately calculate system and per-core CPU usage percentages.
oshi/src/main/java/com/example/CPUInfo.j.human_impl: long[] prevSysTicks = processor.getSystemCpuLoadTicks(); ... TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS.sleep(interval); ... double systemLoad = processor.getSystemCpuLoadBetweenTicks(prevSysTicks);

oshi/src/main/java/com/example/CPUInfo.j.general_idea: Added validation logic to handle potential NaN or negative values returned by the OSHI library on certain platforms.
oshi/src/main/java/com/example/CPUInfo.j.human_impl: // sanitize and convert to percent ... perCoreLoads[i] = perCoreLoads[i] * 100d;

oshi/src/main/java/com/example/CPUInfo.j.general_idea: Improved frequency reporting by adding fallback handling for zero values and using FormatUtil for human-readable output.
Added retrieval of system uptime using OSHI's OperatingSystem API with exception handling for compatibility.
Updated the class Javadoc to reflect the new robust sampling capabilities and defensive checks.
oshi/src/main/java/com/example/CPUInfo.j.human_impl: /** * Validated and more robust CPU info sampler using OSHI. ... */

oshi/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source, target, and release properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin to explicitly use Java 21 for compilation.
Add SLF4J API dependency for logging abstraction.
Add SLF4J Simple implementation dependency for logging.
Replace JUnit 4 with JUnit 5 (Jupiter) for modern testing support.
Add maven-surefire-plugin to support running JUnit 5 tests.
Add maven-jar-plugin to configure the main class in the manifest.
Add maven-shade-plugin to create an executable fat JAR with dependencies.
Downgrade OSHI core version from 6.9.1 to 6.6.5 and externalize version property.
Rename artifact ID and project name to reflect network information focus.
